content: We can reframe generic agent design as a system that must incrementally consolidate its own learned interaction policies through online meta-learning, purpose-built to mitigate the catastrophic forgetting of early environmental exploration patterns that drive curiosity-driven learning. This creates a curiosity-preserving agent that retains the exploratory behaviors that made it effective early in training even as it specializes for downstream reward-seeking tasks.
source_topics: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
trigger_topic: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
